description: Crafted from leather, this brown wallet from turtle is fabulously stylish and well organised. This two-fold wallet has lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday useDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHas two main compartments with fabric lining for durabilitySix credit card slots and three insert pocketOne compartment with a press buttoned closure on the right for coinsBranding embossed on the coin pocketCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
